subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O God of existence and Sovereign over the unseen and the seen! I beseech Thee by the Word whereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک یا اله الوجود و المهیمن علی الغیب و الشهود اسئلک بالکلمه التی بها
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
